title: Target Layouts Configuration
description: Configures how bundle primitive files are routed into target directories for each IDE/tool type. Supports hierarchical overrides: built-in → user (~/.config/prompt-registry/layouts.yml) → project (./prompt-registry-layouts.yml). Each level deep-merges kindRoutes so you only need to specify entries you want to change.

layouts.description: Map from target type identifier (e.g. 'vscode', 'kiro') to its layout definitions.

TargetLayoutDef.description: Layout definitions for a target type, keyed by scope (user / repository).

user.description: Layout when the target has scope: user.

repository.description: Layout when the target has scope: repository. Falls back to 'user' layout if absent.

ScopedLayoutDef.description: Layout for one scope: base directory and per-kind subdirectory routing.

baseDir.description: Base directory for installation. Supports ${HOME}, ${USERPROFILE}, and the special ${workspaceRoot} token (resolved from target.workspaceRoot ?? target.path ?? '.' at install time).

kindRoutes.description: Map from bundle sub-path prefix (e.g. 'prompts/') to output sub-path relative to baseDir (e.g. '.github/prompts/'). Keys must end with '/'.

skipPaths.description: Bundle-relative file paths to skip entirely (e.g. manifests, READMEs). Defaults to [deployment-manifest.yml, README.md] if absent.
